critique:
Step 1 is incorrect.

Using f_select_row(*) merely selects all rows without performing the necessary question-driven filtering or sorting. The note “[MUTATED from sort_column]” further indicates an intended sort that was not executed, making this step inappropriate for identifying the first race.
